title: Add M3 benchmarks and long run invariants
summary: Add M3 benchmark and long-run invariant gates for ordinary-life simulation.
acceptance: M3 invariant gate runs the ordinary-life scenario long enough to detect reservation leaks stale offers running job leaks negative needs/resources ability cache divergence condition drift mood/relationship drift queue growth and hash divergence

Benchmarks report need updates condition updates ability cache invalidations thought/social event counts candidate caps path nodes reservation cleanup save/load rebuild time Worker snapshot bytes and final hashes
Benchmark artifacts include Node pnpm OS CPU commit seed scenario tick horizon checkpoint hashes and final summary
Baseline updates are reviewed artifacts and preserve 10 percent warning and 20 percent blocking thresholds
No product behavior fix threshold weakening silent retry repeatEach retries or unrelated implementation is included

history.details: Created by WM-0045 M3 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Implemented M3 long-run invariant gate, m3-ordinary-life-long-run benchmark/default suite registration, baseline/parser/artifact routing, docs and WM-0059 report; required checks passed including typecheck, m3-invariants, bench, sim:run, taskctl validate and git diff --check.

changes_requested: High: stale medical offer/request gate is incomplete: packages/benchmarks/src/m3-ordinary-life-long-run-benchmark.ts:268-270 maps noStaleOffers only to activeMedicalRequests and packages/sim-core/src/m3-invariants.test.ts:96-99 only asserts final activeMedicalRequests, while M3MedicalMetrics.staleBasisRejectCount exists at packages/sim-core/src/m3-medical-care.ts:118-130 and is never propagated from packages/sim-core/src/m3-ordinary-life-scenario.ts:1672-1693. High: condition and mood/relationship drift checks only enforce valid ranges, not stable expected values, at packages/sim-core/src/m3-invariants.test.ts:175-190 and packages/benchmarks/src/m3-ordinary-life-long-run-benchmark.ts:438-456; benchmark invariants omit final condition/mood/relationship values at packages/benchmarks/src/m3-ordinary-life-long-run-benchmark.ts:300-343.

Addressed reviewer changes: M3 summary/benchmarks now propagate stale medical offer basis rejects, invariant gate and baseline compare exact condition/mood/relationship stable values, final artifact refreshed; required checks passed again: typecheck, m3-invariants, bench, sim:run, taskctl validate and git diff --check.

verified: No blocking findings. Verified stale medical basis reject coverage, exact condition/mood/relationship drift assertions, M3 benchmark baseline/parser/artifact fields, artifact SHA E10FA7C8F2376D3AD913E35843ECBBAB1D0AC944F121CD0019425632862EACC7, preserved 10/20 thresholds, no dependency/protocol/schema/app scope; typecheck, m3-invariants, sim:run 100000, taskctl validate and git diff --check passed.

objective: Create artifact-backed M3 performance and invariant evidence before closeout.
forbiddenPaths: product behavior fixes to satisfy tests
silent retries repeatEach or retries changes
M4 lamp Chronicle anomaly crisis-chain or director implementation
benchmarkImpact: Adds reviewed M3 long-run and ordinary-life benchmark artifacts and updates baselines only with explicit 10/20 percent threshold preservation.
reviewRouting: Qa-performance completes to reviewer; project-director integrates only after artifact evidence and required checks are reproducible.
rollbackModel: Revert benchmark tests artifacts and baseline changes; leave M3 open and do not advance closeout.
ownerGate: Name exact artifact paths and hashes in the report
Do not fix product behavior inside the benchmark task
Block on unreproducible artifacts threshold weakening protocol save schema dependency or M4 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Benchmark baselines and long-run invariant gates require qa-performance ownership and independent review.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Verified stale medical basis reject coverage, exact condition/mood/relationship drift assertions, M3 benchmark baseline/parser/artifact fields, artifact SHA E10FA7C8F2376D3AD913E35843ECBBAB1D0AC944F121CD0019425632862EACC7, preserved 10/20 thresholds, no dependency/protocol/schema/app scope; typecheck, m3-invariants, sim:run 100000, taskctl validate and git diff --check passed.
